summary: Tested 3 distinct report templates with different designs. Premium (purple, PRO badge, photo gallery) and Detailed Technical (dark slate, monospace, technical table) render correctly. Standard style uses original WiseDrive design (comprehensive layout) instead of the new StandardReportStyle component - this appears to be intentional design decision.

issues: Standard report uses original WiseDrive design instead of new StandardReportStyle component with blue theme and simple layout
The StandardReportStyle component in ReportStyles.jsx is not being used - InspectionReportPage.jsx falls through to original design for 'standard' style
Category titles are missing in the Detailed Inspection Analysis grid - only shows ratings and progress bars without component names

action_items: DECISION NEEDED: Should Standard Report use the new StandardReportStyle component (blue theme, simple layout) or keep the original WiseDrive design?
If StandardReportStyle should be used, update InspectionReportPage.jsx line 254-289 to render StandardReportStyle instead of original design
Fix Premium Report's Detailed Inspection Analysis section to show category titles (currently showing '0 items inspected' for all categories)
critical_code_review_comments: StandardReportStyle component exists but is not used - InspectionReportPage.jsx renders original design for 'standard' style
Premium Report's inspectionCategories?.map shows category.title but titles appear empty in the rendered output
Sample data (inspectionReportData) may not have proper category titles populated

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Premium and Detailed styles work correctly, Standard style uses original design

context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 report styles tested: standard (original WiseDrive design), premium (purple with PRO badge), detailed (dark technical). StandardReportStyle component exists but not used. Report Templates page has 3 templates with View Sample Report button working correctly.

features_tested.Standard_Report_URL: PARTIAL - Shows original WiseDrive design, not new StandardReportStyle component
features_tested.Premium_Report_URL: PASS - Purple theme, PRO badge, Photo Gallery, Market Value banner all present
features_tested.Detailed_Technical_Report_URL: PASS - Dark slate theme, monospace fonts, technical table with component breakdown
features_tested.Report_Templates_Page: PASS - 3 templates visible, View Report button opens preview modal
features_tested.View_Sample_Report_Button: PASS - Button present in preview modal, opens correct report style
